column1: /Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/readme_en.txt:118:You can do these actions to the piece until the piece lands on something: move, rotate, or drop.
/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/readme_en.txt:208:CLASSIC1         : Only 1 piece preview, no hold function, no hard drop function, less flexible wallkicks.
/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/readme_en.txt:215:CLASSIC-EASY-B   : Soft and hard drop behavior is reversed in this rule.

/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/readme_en.txt:218:DTET             : That game was so good that the evil king had to kill it. This rule is a bit tricky. Has ARE/line clear canceling.
/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/readme_en.txt:225:STANDARD-EXP     : Soft and hard drop behavior is reversed in this rule.
/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/readme_en.txt:234:STANDARD-PLUS    : A rule created by Blink. STANDARD-FAST with no IRS/IHS and faster softdrop.
/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/readme_en.txt:235:STANDARD-SUPER3  : A classical rule with the rotation system of STANDARD rules but no wallkicks. Has ARE canceling.

column2: Clear all garbage lines as fast as possible.
Amount of garbage lines is selectable from 5, 10, and 18.
Try to clear all the lines in the well in one combo.
Goal is selectable from 20, 40, 100 lines, or endless mode (stops when you break your combo).
When the "GOAL" counter reaches zero, the level increases.
There is 2-minute level timer, but it's just a bonus counter and there is no penalty for running out of time.
When the 2-minute level timer runs out, the goal counter resets.
Speed is not fast, but garbage blocks will rise from bottom of the play field, so watch out.
Battle against human or AI opponent. You can send garbage blocks by clearing 2 or more lines at the same time.
Make chains to score as much as you can before you top out!
Premade chains will drop down endlessly. Try to get the most points before time runs out!
Clear chains to send your opponent garbage!
Premade chains will drop down endlessly. Detonate them to neutralize your garbage handicap, then send your opponent garbage!
Clear more than one gem block at a time to send your opponent garbage. Try to clear your gem blocks first!
A puzzle mode based on a fighting game. Use gems to clear blocks of the same color and send garbage.
harddrop.com is running a netplay server. Thanks harddrop.com members!

/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/nullpomino-run/doc/AvalancheVSReadme.txt:11:COUNTER: When ON, ojama you send will cancel out any ojama you may have waiting to be dropped, with any remainder sent to your rival. With FEVER, you can counter part of your ojama to stall the rest for another turn before it drops.
/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/nullpomino-run/doc/AvalancheVSReadme.txt:12:MAX ATTACK: The maximum number of ojama that can drop in one turn.

/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/nullpomino-run/doc/AvalancheVSReadme.txt:14:MIN CHAIN: Chain hits smaller than the setting will not send any ojama. For example, if MIN CHAIN is set to 3, and you perform a 4 chain, the first 2 hits will be ignored, but the 3rd and 4th hits will send ojama.
/Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/nullpomino-run/doc/AvalancheVSReadme.txt:15:OJAMA RATE: The smaller this number, the more ojama you send.

column2: COUNTER: Each chain hit that counters ojama waiting to drop adds a Fever Point.
CLEAR: Each chain hit that clears an ojama block on the board adds a Fever Point.
COUNTER: Each chain hit done by your rival which counters ojama you sent adds to your time.
ATTACK: Each chain hit done by you which adds to your rival's ojama adds to your time.
ON: 30 ojama is added to the value of your next clear.

FEVER: If you're in Fever Mode, or the chain that ended in the ZENKESHI also activates Fever Mode, your Fever Mode chain gets 2 steps added to it. If you're not in Fever Mode, you get a premade 4-hit chain placed on your board.
OJAMA: The meter shows the amount of ojama you have waiting to drop.

column1: /Users/tatsheen/claw-repos/oss-index/puzzle-bench/nullpomino/nullpomino-run/doc/AvalancheVSReadme.txt:51:SHOW CHAIN: Sets the chain number display below the field.

column2: PLAYER: Player 1's chains are shown in red, while player 2's chains are shown in blue.
SIZE: Chains that are less than the MIN CHAIN (and thus do not send ojama) are shown in red, while chains that do send ojama are shown in green.
